---
title: "Teaching"
---

My teaching is centred on quantitative ecology, demographic methods, and reproducible data analysis. I lead core and advanced courses at the University of Southern Denmark, and have developed open course books and interactive resources that are freely available to students and researchers.

## Current and recent courses

- Population Biology and Evolution (BB512) - compulsory second-year course
- Data Handling, Visualisation and Statistics (BB852) - compulsory master's course
- Introduction to Biodemography - elective third-year course
- Quantitative Conservation Ecology - elective master's course

The course books and interactive Shiny applications below are openly published and freely available.

## Course resources

- Population Biology and Evolution book: [BB512 Book](https://jonesor.github.io/BB512_Book/)
- Data Handling, Visualisation and Statistics book: [BB852 Book](https://jonesor.github.io/BB852_Book/)
- Population Biology and Evolution apps: [BB512 Shiny suite](https://jonesor.shinyapps.io/bb512suite/)
- Data Handling, Visualisation and Statistics apps: [BB852 Shiny suite](https://jonesor.shinyapps.io/bb852suite/)
